mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.student_id AS studentId, a.teacher_id AS teacherId, a.course_id AS courseId, a.alert_message AS alertMessage, a.is_read AS isRead, a.create_time AS createTime, s.name AS studentName, c.coursename AS courseName FROM homework_alert a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY a.is_read ASC, a.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM homework_alert WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_read = 0
